rulings.Case Title: CARROLL CONNOR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, March 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT CAMPBELL SOUP COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to March 18, 2010 per stipulation and order filed March 2, 2010. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CARROLL CONNOR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, March 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. The hearing on Metalclad Insulation Corporation¿s motion for summary adjudication is continued on the court¿s own motion to March 8, 2010, but anyone wishing to contest the tentative ruling must do so by 4:30pm today. Metalclad¿s motion for summary judgment has been withdrawn. The only aspect of Metalclad¿s alternate motion for summary adjudication that remains is issue 6 seeking summary adjudication on the claim for punitive damages, which is granted. Metalclad satisfied its burden of production by presenting plaintiffs¿ factually devoid responses to contention interrogatories. Plaintiffs have not raised a triable issue by the required standard of clear and convincing evidence. =(220/HEK)
